description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: No School - Presidents Day (Winter Break)
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School (4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596)
events.description: School closed Feb 12th–16th for Presidents Day (noted in the classroom newsletter as "February 12th-16th: No School - Presidents Day").

events.title: Double Author Visit (Author Visit Date Change)
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School (books to be shipped to: 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596)
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12th. If students would like to order books to be signed on the day of the visit, orders should be placed through Rakestraw Bookstore and shipped to the school's address (4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596). Books will be delivered on the day of the visit and authors will sign them. (No specific time provided in the message.)

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK & Kindergarten only)
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary — MPR (4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596). A livestream link will be sent a few days before the event for those who cannot attend in person.
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten only on Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 9:30 AM in the MPR. The event is expected to run about 9:30–10:00 AM. A livestream link will be sent out a few days before the event. Contact Mrs. Gold (jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org) with questions.

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0.0 to 1.0 indicating extraction certainty
confidence.title: Confidence

importance.description: Event importance: 'action_required' for closures, schedule changes, deadlines the user must act on; 'fyi' for themed days, birthdays, informational items that are nice to know
importance.title: Importance
